label: CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels

node.label: CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels
node.definition: CUDA, ROCm, Triton, and custom kernels map tensor operations onto accelerator threads, memory tiles, vector units, and communication primitives.
node.why_it_matters: The role of CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels is to connect GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators, Algorithms & data structures to downstream capabilities including Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion.
examples: substrate for Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion
combined with GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators, Algorithms & data structures.

dependencies.rationale: CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels turns GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels turns Algorithms & data structures into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels turns Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
